title: Assistant Store Manager - V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners:
V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners!
